name: Nextcloud
description: A suite of client-server software for creating and using file hosting services. It is functionally similar to Dropbox, with the primary functional difference being that Nextcloud is free and open-source.
longDescription:
Nextcloud is a suite of client-server software for creating and using file hosting services. It is functionally similar to Dropbox, with the primary functional difference being that Nextcloud is free and open-source, allowing anyone to install and operate it on a private server.

Nextcloud is designed to be self-hosted, giving users complete control over their data. It offers features like file synchronization, calendar management, contact management, task scheduling, document editing, bookmarking, news feed aggregation, and much more through a web interface or mobile and desktop clients.

The software is developed by Nextcloud GmbH, a German company created by Frank Karlitschek, who was also the founder of ownCloud. Nextcloud is committed to open-source principles and European data protection standards.
